product: Dashboard publishing, scheduling, and field management improvements
tagline: Notify viewers disabled by default for dashboard publishing: When publishing dashboards, the Notify viewers option is now turned off by default to reduce unintended notifications.
what_it_does: Notify viewers disabled by default for dashboard publishing: When publishing dashboards, the Notify viewers option is now turned off by default to reduce unintended notifications. New functions for custom calculations: Custom calculations now support over 170 functions. Drag and drop field reordering in visualizations: Authors can now drag to reorder fields when creating some visualizations such as Pivot and Line charts.
why_it_matters: Notify viewers disabled by default for dashboard publishing: When publishing dashboards, the Notify viewers option is now turned off by default to reduce unintended notifications.
